_comment: Copy to ds2api/config.json and fill in your DeepSeek account + a client API key. config.json is gitignored so secrets don't leak. SECURITY: this mode uses your DeepSeek web session — may violate DeepSeek ToS. Choose paid DeepSeek API or OpenRouter for production.

accounts.name: primary
accounts.remark: DeepSeek web login — sign up at chat.deepseek.com
